title: Smoked Salmon German Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful German-inspired stir fry featuring smoked salmon and a variety of spices.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced sausage and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the sausage from the skillet and set aside.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until tender, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the smoked salmon to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until heated through.
Return the cooked sausage to the skillet and stir in the stir-fry sauce.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve the smoked salmon mixture over the sliced German bread.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
